title: Blakea clavata
taxonomy: Blakea clavata is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It belongs to the genus Blakea, which is a group of flowering plants native to South America. The family Melastomataceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the "membrane flowers." The classification of Blakea clavata places it within the clade Asterids, a large group of flowering plants that also includes the families Solanaceae and Gentianaceae.
